cases.label: Roman Giertych commentary essay
cases.description: Single-narrator political commentary / explainer essay with archival visuals. Previously tracked as generic/commentary-like before the dedicated commentary class was introduced.
cases.notes: Added as a commentary benchmark. It resembles a narrated commentary video more than a dialogue-driven podcast.

reasons: Speech coverage is high enough for narrator-led commentary.
Utterances are long enough to form explanatory monologue beats.
The transcript contains many longer explanatory turns.

selection_reasons: good speech density for a short clip
starts with a stronger hook signal
contains high-importance transcript moments
clips.summary: Czy jest to, jak on sam twierdzi, ewolucja, pragmatyzm, zwykłe przejście tam, gdzie jest władza zasilane wrogością do byłych koalicjantów? Prawdopodobnie po trochu wszystko naraz....

selection_reasons: good speech density for a short clip
stays relatively clear despite overlap risk
starts with a stronger hook signal
clips.summary: Jak oceniać Romana Giertycha? Jeśli patrzeć wyłącznie na kwestie światopoglądowe, na aborcję, homoseksualizm, role kościoła, to Giertych nie zmienił się tak bardzo, jak się wydaje....

selection_reasons: stays relatively clear despite overlap risk
starts with a stronger hook signal
good speech density for a short clip
clips.summary: Czy naprawdę zmienił poglądy, czy tylko zmienił otoczenie? I co o całej historii Romana Giertycha mówi niedawny materiał śledczy Szymona Jadrzaka o tajemniczych przelewach z Liechtensteinu i rosyjskich powiązaniach jego...

selection_reasons: good speech density for a short clip
stays relatively clear despite overlap risk
contains high-importance transcript moments

top_quality_issues.label: Scoring chooses setup / ad-like / weak-payoff clips too often.
Clip boundaries still start too early or end too weakly.
Crop / framing still hurts readability on reviewed clips.

largest_remaining_issue.label: Scoring chooses setup / ad-like / weak-payoff clips too often.

iteration_changes: Benchmark now preserves existing human review rows when regenerating `benchmarks/human_review_template.csv` and includes reviewed rows from earlier runs instead of wiping them.
Human review is now merged into `benchmarks/results.json` and `benchmarks/report.md`, including averages, reviewed outliers, note issue counts and data-backed top problems.
Gameplay local scoring now lightly penalizes sponsor-like clips, setup/waiting windows and weak-payoff segments instead of rewarding them mostly on heatmap plus chatter.
Selection outputs now carry boundary metadata, and cutter logs now record whether sentence-boundary refinement was used for each clip.

Rendering is now content-aware per material type: tutorial uses a 9:16 full-frame blur-background layout, gameplay uses a safer gameplay-priority crop, podcast keeps face-driven framing, commentary stays stable and generic falls back to safe center crop.

recommendation.title: Keep tuning local scoring against low-payoff selections
recommendation.reason: Human review still shows more relevance problems than routing or rendering problems.
